arabic_text:
مستجیب
مؤمن
مکاسر
ماذون
داعی مطلق
داعی بلاغ
حجت
بابیت
امامت
وصایت
داعی محسور
دعات طیبی
دعات محمدی
دعات قائمی
باب الأبواب
ائمہ
علی
english_text:
Mustajib (1) — Responder
Mu'min (2) — Believer
Mukasir (3) — Breaker
Ma'dhun (4) — Permitted one
Da'i Mutlaq (5) — Absolute Missionary
Da'i Balagh (6) — Communicating Missionary
Hujjat (7) — Proof
Babiyyat (8) — Doorship
Imamat (9) — Imamate
Wisayat (10) — Vicegerency
Da'i Mahsoor — Limited Missionary
Tayyibi Da'is
Muhammadi Da'is
Qa'imi Da'is
Baab al-Abwaab — Door of Doors
Imams
Ali
alt_text: Two side-by-side tables enumerating 10 ranks of the Ismaili spiritual hierarchy. Right table (ranks 1-5): Mustajib, Mu'min, Mukasir, Ma'dhun, Da'i Mutlaq. Left table (ranks 6-10): Da'i Balagh, Hujjat, Babiyyat, Imamat (red), Wisayat (red). Annotations on the right margin group ranks 1-4 as 'Da'i Mahsoor' (Limited Missionary) and rank 5 as 'Tayyibi Da'is'. Left margin groups 6 as 'Muhammadi Da'is', 7 as 'Qa'imi Da'is', 8 as 'Baab al-Abwaab', 9 as 'Imams', and 10 as 'Ali'.
notes: Master enumeration of the 10 ranks of the Ismaili spiritual hierarchy with their grouping into successive levels of authority. Pairs with image 002 which gives the corresponding spiritual / cosmological aspect of each rank.
